title: Immortal Imperial Teacher
content:
Shang Xuandao
 was the presumed Imperial Teacher of the 
Celestial Clan
 and one of the two remaining 
Mourning-Death Clan
 members. It was later revealed that he was only a substitute for the true Imperial Teacher 
Hai Zi
, in order to fool 
Lian Daozhen
 as part of the grand scheme to free the 
Mourning-Death Clan
 from the Celestial Royal Family's rule.

It is said that his strength surpasses that of the three Imperial Teachers of the 
Ancient Clan
 even if they worked together. He cultivates the dao of void/nullity.

He possesses the Dao Eye Soul counterpart to the Great Soul Sect's Soul Eye Dao.

History
[
]

He plotted along with the genius of the Mourning-Death Clan, the Great Soul Sect's founder, against the Celestial Royal Family to get their freedom. Eventually receiving the rank of Imperial Teacher, he became the Sect Master of the 
Dao Sect
 in the 
Central Continent
 as well as 
Lian Daozhen
's attendant.

Book 12
[
]

He was the Imperial Teacher and servant of the Celestial Emperor, 
Lian Daozhen
. His entire clan was enslaved to serve the 
Celestial Ancestor
 and his descendants. He secretly schemed against Lian Daozhen to obtain Wang Lin's body in order to break the seal placed on him and his clan. He tried to tempt Wang Lin by offering him the inheritance and power of the 
Celestial Ancestor
. When he captured Wang Lin, he thought he had destroyed Wang Lin's soul, but Wang Lin tricked him by going into the 
Heaven Defying Bead
. The Imperial Teacher was able to absorb the Celestial Ancestor's power and inheritance, but it only ended up benefiting Wang Lin when Wang Lin took back his body. At the last moments of his life, he remembered that he wasn't the true Imperial Teacher and in fact it was 
Hai Zi
. 

↑

Chapter 1993
